en.atmosphere: Mountain town west of Tokyo (49M sqm forest), zero crime, elevation 224m. Ome Line terminus (23:52). Hikers only.
en.landmarks: Ome Line scenic route. Forest access, hiking trails, outdoor rock climbing. Station is barely a shelter.
en.food: 1 restaurant + 4 spots. Zero izakayas. Expect ryokans or self-catering.
en.nightlife: None. Last train 23:52, trains sparse. Close to Tokyo but feels remote.

ja.atmosphere: 奥多摩山頂（49M森林）。治安10点満点。23時52分で終電。ハイカーのみ。
ja.landmarks: 青梅線景観。森、トレイル、クライミング。駅は風避けのみ。

ru.atmosphere: Горный город к западу от Токио (49M кв.м лес), преступность 0, высота 224м. Ome Line тупик (23:52).
ru.landmarks: Ome Line пейзажи, лес, тропы, скалолазание. Станция — просто беседка.
